steps.title: Use the two given points
steps.content: The values $h(0)=36$ and $h(1)=35$ give two points on the line: $(0,36)$ and $(1,35)$.

steps.title: Find slope and intercept
steps.content:
The slope is
$$m=\frac{35-36}{1-0}=-1$$
Since $h(0)=36$, the vertical intercept is $36$.

steps.title: Write the linear function
steps.content: A linear function with slope $-1$ and intercept $36$ is $$h(x)=-x+36$$ The answer is A.
